ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Shooting)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's shooting skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Melee)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's melee skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Construction)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's construction skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Mining)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's mining skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Cooking)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's cooking skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Plants)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's plants skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Animals)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's animals skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Crafting)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A brain chip automatically used when growing clones. It will greatly increase the clone's Crafting skill.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: Brain chip (Great Intellectual)
